disclaimer: Not measured UE5 runs in CI. Published/industry order-of-magnitude budgets for dashboard comparison only.

game_world_soa_10k.notes: Full harness: 10k entities × 600 ticks. Li/cpp ~0.6–0.8ms median on dev CPU — micro-kernel, not UE editor.
game_world_soa_10k.measurement_path: External: UE Insights / Unreal Stats `STAT_Group_*` on equivalent sample project (manual upload to data/external/ue-baselines.csv)

game_replication_encode.notes: Harness measures encode rounds, not live player count.
game_replication_encode.measurement_path: net.ReplicationGraph + packet capture; compare bytes/tick vs our checksum kernel

sim_physics_frame.notes: Li stub kernel ~0.6ms; production Chaos is scene-dependent.
sim_physics_frame.measurement_path: UE stat Physics, Tracy; map to tier2_world/sim_physics_frame scale

cloth_swing.notes: gaming_full Li/cpp ~4.7ms on reference kernel — simplified PBD.

rigid_body_stack.notes: Harness has no contact stacking yet.

agentic_parity_pillars: Natural-language patch with lic build gate
Killer UX: command palette, adaptive panels (PH-UX)
